title: hieracium praecox subsp. cinerascens
intro: Hieracium praecox subsp. cinerascens, also known as Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Hawkweed include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Hawkweed include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
